Daily quest

Kill Tefat

Objective

Typekill

Defeat 1 Tefat in Hyperion.

Take down the fierce Tefat.

Targets

  • System: Hyperion
  • Enemies / bosses: Tefat

Rewards

RewardAmount / roll
XP62-320

Detected Solution Path

  1. Travel to Hyperion.
  2. Complete 1 kill(s) against Tefat.
  3. Claim the daily reward after the objective completes.
